title: Graaff-Reinet Golf Club's weekly results
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET SPORT NEWS - At Graaff-Reinet Golf Club, players braved the wind and the cold in the different competitions held last weekend.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET SPORT NEWS - At Graaff-Reinet Golf Club, players braved the wind and the cold in the different competitions held last weekend."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"No matter the weather, the players always seem to have fun.","html":"No matter the weather, the players always seem to have fun."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Two Clubs"},{"type":"list","items":["1st Niek Steyn 32","2nd Yvonne Drummond 30","3rd Dan Yeadon 29"],"ordered":false},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Medal Net"},{"type":"list","items":["A division Noel Taylor -Freeme 69","B division Derem Helm 79","C division Niek Steyn 73"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
